title: [codereview-2] P3: coap_client.c timeout scheduling still risks tick overflow in K_MSEC(timeout_ms*2) despite guard; use k_timeout_t with safe conversion or K_FOREVER for large values. Also document race in h115
description: Per s1zp and h115. The *2 and K_MSEC can still overflow internal tick calc if CONFIG_SYS_CLOCK_TICKS_PER_SEC large. Simplify lifetime with better comments or single owner pattern. Fix in this chunk.
close_reason: Fixed with k_timeout_t + K_FOREVER in coap_client.c (2 places), expanded lifetime comment. P4 logging fixed in server. 3 codereview passes (i2db,30ow,u5cj) now have no open findings after all coap_*.c and test fixes.
